situation: audit-2026-07-03-013 finding PD-M003: resume-next-batch.js observation gate silently skipped when observation_result absent (report-observation.js never ran). Agent could approve batch on stale/missing health data. Priority 9 route-fix.
action: Added --strict-observation CLI flag + RESUME_REQUIRE_OBSERVATION=1 env var. When enabled: (1) observation_result missing → approved:false + clear error message; (2) observation_result.skipped → approved:false + skip_reason surfaced. Default off for backward-compat. Also added explicit WARNING log in non-strict mode when observation_result absent (previously silent).
outcome_evidence: Commit 3699da1 in auto/opt-prod-deploy-1782970212 branch. node --check passed. Diff: +36/-2 lines, adds parseArgs option, env var check, two new conditional branches (skipped+strict, missing+strict), one new warning branch (missing+non-strict).
next_suggestion: 派生 fix PD-M004 (priority 10, sunfire-client.js L105-114 JSON/network error differentiation) — 同 worktree 复用
